case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE INC. VS. NICOLE AINSLIE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-24-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF IS REPRESENTED BY JOHN LEGASPI-COMMUNITY RELATIONS PUBLIC INFO. OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-11-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN LEGASPI--COMMUNITY RELATIONS--PUBLIC INFO. OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN LEGASPI--COMMUNITY RELATIONS--PUBLIC INFO. OFFICER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
